footer_tagline: The most gaúcho city in Rio Grande do Sul, 3rd Farroupilha Capital. Here, every place tells a story.
footer_sedetur: Municipal Secretariat for Economic Development and Tourism
footer_madeby: Developed by AI Horizon Labs · Content partially provided by the Municipal Secretariat for Development and Partnership
home_hero_lead: A land of wide horizons, living history and pulsing gaúcho culture, where every experience goes beyond what you see at first glance.
home_stat_terr: Largest municipality in RS by area
home_about_p1: Recognized as one of the most gaúcho cities in Rio Grande do Sul and the 3rd Farroupilha Capital, Alegrete carries the traditions and pride of the Pampa people.
home_about_p2: Quality of life shines through the gentle rhythm of daily life, the open-air spaces and the contact with nature, while the city surprises with diverse cuisine and a lively nightlife.
home_atr_p: From gaúcho folklore to century-old squares, the landmarks that give Alegrete its soul.
home_atr_chapeu: One of the most recognized symbols of Alegrete's cultural identity, inspired by the figure of the gaúcho.
home_atr_igreja: Opened in 1919, with imposing, richly detailed architecture, in the heart of the city.
home_atr_ponte: Over the Ibirapuitã River, one of the postcards, a privileged view of the Pampa.
home_atr_museu: Ícaro Ferreira da Costa, an immersion in the culture and traditions of the gaúcho people.
home_atr_praca: The Central Square, the city's leafy heart, history, leisure and community.
home_atr_obelisco: The “Picolé do Adão”, 17 metres tall, marks 150 years of the Farroupilha Revolution.
home_video_p: A journey through the soul of Alegrete: wide horizons, living tradition and the hospitality of the Western Frontier.
home_video_fallback: Your browser does not support video playback.
home_explore_p: Pick a path, every stop is an invitation to feel Alegrete.
exp_attractions_d: Monuments, museums, squares and the city's postcards.
exp_history_d: Farrapos, railway and the journey of Alegrete.
exp_food_d: Sausage Capital, open-fire barbecue and the best tables.
exp_stay_d: Hotels, inns, cabins and camping for every style.
exp_housing_d: Real estate agencies, a neighborhood guide and rental tips for moving to Alegrete.
exp_sports_d: Running, Pampa kayaking, horse riding and the Farroupilha Stadium.
exp_nature_d: Rivers, Pampa trails and the long-distance Caminho do Pampa.
exp_events_d: Campereada, Sausage Festival, Farroupilha Week and EFIPAN.
exp_shopping_d: Free shops in Rivera, Uruguaiana and Artigas.
exp_region_d: Alegrete vineyards, the Uruguay and Argentina border.
exp_getting_d: Bus station, regional airport, highways and distances.
exp_health_d: Reference hospital, urgent care and health posts on the map.
exp_uni_d: Unipampa, IFFar, URCAMP, Pampatec and the Student House.
home_taste_h: Where to eat and where to stay
home_taste_p: From traditional campfire sausage to parrillas and cafés, and a rest worthy of the Pampa.
home_taste_eat_p: Parrillas, xis, cafés and the authentic traditional campfire sausage, over 500 tonnes a year.
home_taste_stay_p: Downtown hotels, inns, cabins and camping sites surrounded by Pampa nature.
home_events_p: Tradition, flavor, sport and culture fill Alegrete's calendar.
home_cta_sub: Want to know more? Reach out to official tourism and live this experience.
home_links_p: Official sources and local profiles with up-to-date, day-to-day information.
atr_lead: Monuments, museums, century-old squares and landmarks that tell the history and soul of Alegrete. Here, every stop is an invitation to feel the Pampa.
atr_private_p: Beyond the public landmarks, Alegrete offers experiences by appointment, from Luz do Pampa's live-music trails to the dream of the city's first winery.
atr_vinhas_p: 18 km away, by the BR-290, 5 hectares of Chardonnay, Merlot, Tannat and Cabernet. Book via @vinhasdoalegrete.
atr_luz_p: 9 km from town: trails with live music, a sunset toast and night hikes. Book via @luzdopampa.
atr_caminho_p: A 170 km long-distance trail in the Ibirapuitã EPA, part of the Brazilian Trails Network. @caminhodopampa.
hist_lead: From the Jesuit missions to the Farroupilha Revolution: the story of a people who rebuilt their city more than once.
hist_p1: Alegrete's origins date back to 1626, tied to the Spanish Jesuit missions. The land belonged to the Yapeyú reduction before being claimed for the Portuguese crown in 1801.
hist_p2: The city's history is one of resilience: after the first settlement (1812) was burned by followers of José Artigas (the “Burned Chapel” episode), the people rebuilt today's town on the banks of the Ibirapuitã River.
hist_capital_p: During the Farroupilha Revolution (1835–1845), Alegrete became the Third Capital of the Riograndense Republic and hosted Brazil's first Republican Constituent Assembly, in 1842.
hist_people_p: Alegrete is the hometown of poet Mário Quintana (1906), one of the great names of Brazilian literature, and of diplomat and statesman Oswaldo Aranha. It is also known as the cradle of the Canto Alegretense (by Antônio Augusto “Nico” Fagundes) and of leading figures of gaúcho traditionalism.
hist_mon_p: Discover the historic Borges de Medeiros Bridge (scene of the 1923 battle), the Gothic-style Mother Church (1919), the century-old Railway Station with its steam engine, and the Negrinho do Pastoreio monument by sculptor Vasco Prado.
hist_museum_p: The Oswaldo Aranha Museum holds the famous diplomat's collection. Regional culture also lives on at the Gaúcho Museum and the city's cultural centers, alongside the 16 CTGs that keep tradition alive.
hist_mil_p: Alegrete hosts one of the country's largest military contingents, with visits to combat equipment, an equestrian season and parades that reinforce the city's frontier vocation.
food_lead: The capital of campfire sausage: open-fire barbecue, charque, artisan cheeses and the best of Pampa cuisine.
food_typ_p: Alegrete's cuisine is pure Pampa: meat, fire, abundance and mate always within reach.
food_t1_p: The star of the gaúcho table: prime cuts slow-roasted over embers, with coarse salt and patience.
food_t2_p: Alegrete is the State Capital of Campfire Sausage, with artisan production of hundreds of tons a year.
food_t3_p: Estancia heritage: charque (jerked beef), arroz de carreteiro and the feijão-tropeiro that fed generations of ranch hands.
food_t4_p: Dulce de leche, ambrosia and the inevitable round of chimarrão to end, or start, the day.
food_places_p: A selection of addresses with contact and location. Tap a card to call, follow on Instagram or get directions.
stay_lead: From downtown comfort to country inns: where to rest after a day in the Pampa.
stay_p: Options for every budget and style, from business hotels to rural tourism and motorhomes.
sports_lead: Runs across the Pampa, padel, kayaking on the Ibirapuitã, horse riding and courts for the usual pickup game.
sports_p: An active city all year round: from asphalt to water, from field to court.
sports_run_p: The Independence Half Marathon and circuits like the Conesul draw runners from across the region.
sports_padel_p: Padel is booming, adding to the football (society), volleyball and tennis courts spread across the city.
sports_water_p: The Ibirapuitã River is a stage for kayaking, stand up paddle and rowing, nature and adrenaline minutes from downtown.
sports_horse_p: Equestrian seasons, lasso contests and bronc riding keep the alegretense bond with the horse alive.
sports_press_p: Packed road races, kayaking across the Pampa and frontier horse contests, reports from the Alegrete Tudo portal.
sports_press_src: Articles published by the Alegrete Tudo portal · tap to read the full story.
tri_p: Where Brazil, Uruguay and Argentina meet, paddlers from across the border row together along the Quaraí and Uruguay rivers to the Zero Mark and the historic Iron Bridge — a crossing that celebrates nature, adventure and the integration of the three countries.
tri_p2: Alegrete's Tropeiros de Capincho group has joined several editions, including the 4th Trinational Crossing, camping by the river under the flags of all three nations.
tri_cap: Photos: Tropeiros de Capincho · 4th Trinational Crossing
nature_lead: The Pampa at its purest: rivers to fish and paddle, the biome's only federal reserve and trails crossing the Campanha.
nature_p: Grasslands, wetlands, gallery forests and vast skies, the Pampa invites you to slow down.
nature_river_p: The river that embraces the city is perfect for fishing, kayaking, stand up paddle and sunset boat rides.
nature_apa_p: At around 317,000 hectares, it is the only federal Environmental Protection Area in the Pampa biome, sheltering grasslands, wetlands and native wildlife.
nature_trail_p: The Caminho do Pampa, a long-distance trail, runs through the EPA with dozens of kilometers already mapped for sustainable tourism.
nature_birds_p: The grasslands and wetlands are a paradise for birdwatchers, rich in Pampa bird species.
events_lead: Tradition, flavor and sport all year long, the calendar that makes Alegrete pulse.
events_p: The dates that bring locals and visitors together around gaúcho culture.
events_note: Dates may vary each edition, confirm on official channels.
agenda_src_p: See the full, always up-to-date schedule of events in Alegrete, maintained by SEDETUR.
agenda_p: The next confirmed events on the city's agenda, per the official schedule.
agenda_note: Partial list. The full, always up-to-date schedule is on the
events_venues_p: The main spaces hosting festivals, fairs and celebrations in Alegrete, many multi-purpose, like Parque Lauro Dornelles, which is also nature and leisure.
shop_lead: On the Mercosur triple frontier: free shops, perfumes, wines and electronics just kilometers from Alegrete.
shop_p: Alegrete is the perfect base for a day trip to the twin cities of Uruguay and Argentina.
shop_tip1_p: Bring a valid ID card or passport. Minors require specific documentation.
shop_tip2_p: The land allowance is US$500 per person. Above that, you must declare and pay tax on return.
shop_tip3_p: Free shops usually accept reais, US dollars and cards. Compare prices and the day's exchange rate.
region_lead: From the Campanha wine route to Uruguay's hot springs and Argentina's historic cities, all within reach of Alegrete.
region_p: Day trips or weekend routes starting from Alegrete.
region_wine_p: The region is Brazilian wine's new frontier. Visit Almadén in Santana do Livramento (the country's largest vineyard) and Guatambu in Dom Pedrito, with tours, tastings and the Pampa Train.
region_uy_p: Rivera and its shopping, the hot springs of Salto and, farther on, Montevideo, capital of beaches and River Plate history.
region_ar_p: Paso de los Libres, neighboring Corrientes and vibrant Buenos Aires, all connected through the Uruguaiana border.
getting_lead: How to get in and out: highways, buses, airports and the distances that connect Alegrete to the world.
getting_air_p: Gaudêncio Machado Ramos Airport sits by km 592 of the BR-290, about 12 km from downtown. For regular commercial flights, the airports of Uruguaiana, Santa Maria and Porto Alegre (Salgado Filho) are the main gateways.
getting_road_p: Alegrete sits on the Mercosur corridor: the BR-290 links the city to Porto Alegre and the Uruguaiana border, complemented by the RS-377 and RS-566.
getting_bus_p: The Bus Station connects Alegrete to Porto Alegre (about 7h) and Uruguaiana (about 2h, several daily departures). From Uruguaiana (a hub equidistant from Porto Alegre, Montevideo and Buenos Aires) international lines depart to Argentina and Uruguay.
getting_bus_companies_p: Alegrete's Bus Station (Praça Osvaldo Aranha, 20 · Canudos district) gathers intercity, interstate and international lines. Buy directly through the official channels.
getting_intl_bus: International lines to Argentina, Uruguay and Chile via Uruguaiana, check at the bus station.
getting_mob_p: In Alegrete, getting around town is mainly by taxi, radio-taxi and public buses. Apps like Uber and 99 have limited or no coverage, use the local services below.
getting_mob_taxi_p: Taxi ranks downtown, at the bus station and in the main neighborhoods. Radio-taxi takes bookings by phone and WhatsApp for trips around town and to the airport.
getting_mob_app_p: Forget Uber: in Alegrete ride-hailing runs on local options like Rota77 and Garupa. See the highlights just below.
getting_app_p: In Alegrete, Uber is not an option: ride-hailing runs on local and regional apps. Download one before you arrive to get around the city with ease.
getting_app_rota_p: The city's leading urban mobility app, with over a thousand rides a day. Choose your vehicle category and track your trip in real time.
getting_app_garupa_p: Brazilian mobility app with a moto-taxi option, faster and cheaper, plus women drivers for women passengers.
getting_app_mais_p: Local ride app. Search for "Alegrete+" in your phone's app store and confirm availability on arrival.
getting_mob_bus_p: Urban lines connect the neighborhoods to downtown. Check routes and timetables at the urban terminal.
getting_mob_disc: Tip: Planalto Transportes offers a discount for teachers, students and military on selected lines, show your ID when buying the ticket.
saude_lead: A reference hospital, urgent care, clinics and the network of health posts, because visitors (and people thinking of moving here) value care too.
saude_intro_p: Alegrete is a regional health reference. The Santa Casa serves the whole Western Frontier, with an excellent neonatal ICU and a high-risk pregnancy clinic. Add to that municipal urgent care and a broad Primary Care network (ESF/UBS) across the neighborhoods.
saude_map_p: Tap a card or pin to see the address and get directions.
saude_emergency_p: In an emergency, call for free:
saude_disclaimer: This page is being completed. Addresses, phone numbers and the exact location of units should be confirmed with Alegrete's Municipal Health Department. Items marked “To confirm” are still being verified.
uni_lead: Universities, a federal institute, a tech park and student housing, the city that educates and welcomes those who come to study in the Pampa.
uni_intro_h: A university town in the heart of the Pampa
uni_intro_p: Alegrete brings together public and community higher education: Unipampa, with its engineering and computer science degrees, the Farroupilha Federal Institute, URCAMP and the Pampatec science and technology park. For those coming from elsewhere, there is also the Student House and a city that welcomes students, faculty and staff.
uni_map_h: Campuses and spaces on the map
uni_map_p: Tap a card or pin to see the address and official website.
uni_spot_lead: The Federal University of Pampa is public, federal and 100% free, training professionals in Alegrete across engineering, computer science and, now, artificial intelligence, with high-quality teaching and strong impact across the Western Frontier.
uni_spot_p1_p: A Brazilian state university, with a nationally recognized degree and a faculty of PhDs.
uni_spot_p2_p: Undergraduate study, research and outreach with no tuition at all, plus support programs for students from out of town.
uni_spot_p3_p: Engineering, Computer Science and the new AI degree that transform the region and open doors in Brazil and worldwide.
bia_tag: Brazil's most innovative and disruptive AI degree, right here in Alegrete.
bia_lead: Unipampa brings to the Western Frontier the Bachelor's in Artificial Intelligence (BIA): a public, free program designed for those who will build the future of AI, data and automation in the Pampa, in Brazil and around the world.
atr_map_p: See where each landmark is and get directions, tap a pin to open its location.
footer_credits: Praça dos Patinhos photo: Gabriel Sathler · Wikimedia Commons (CC BY 3.0).
mor_lead: Moving to Alegrete? We've gathered the city's real-estate agencies, a neighbourhood guide and practical renting tips for newcomers to Alegrete.
mor_intro_h: A calm city to live in on the Pampa
mor_intro_p: Alegrete is a mid-sized city with an affordable cost of living, calm traffic and everything close by. Whether you come to study at Unipampa or IFFar, to work or to start a new life, there are rentals and homes for sale across many districts, from apartments downtown to houses with yards in the residential areas. Below: local agencies, a quick neighbourhood guide and a step-by-step to renting.
mor_map_p: Tap a pin or card for the address, website and route.
mor_hoods_p: A general overview to start your search, confirm with the agency what fits your routine.
mor_hood_centro_p: Shops, banks, squares and services on foot. More apartments and commercial spaces; ideal if you want everything nearby.
mor_hood_cidadealta_p: A traditional residential district near downtown, with houses and tree-lined streets, a quiet option for families.
mor_hood_universidade_p: Students at Unipampa or IFFar often look for homes and shared houses in the districts on the way to the campuses and in the central area.
mor_hood_vilas_p: Vila Nova, Ibirapuitã, Promorar, Macedo, Nova Brasília and others offer houses with yards and more affordable rents.
mor_tip_docs_p: Have your ID (RG), CPF and proof of income ready. If you're from out of town, proof of enrolment or employment helps.
mor_tip_guarantee_p: Most contracts ask for a local guarantor (fiador). No guarantor in town? Some agencies work with rent insurance or no-guarantor rentals.
mor_tip_costs_p: Factor in property tax (IPTU), water, electricity and, for apartments, the condo fee. Ask what's included before signing.
mor_tip_contract_p: Prefer agents and agencies with a CRECI licence. Read the contract, check the term, the adjustment clause and the move-in inspection.
mor_list_p: Local rental and sales agencies. Tap to call, visit the website or get directions.
hist_uni_p: Alegrete is also a higher-education hub: home to Unipampa (Federal University of the Pampa), the Federal Institute Farroupilha (IFFar) and URCAMP, plus the Pampatec science and technology park, training professionals and drawing students from across the region.
trad_lead: The 3rd Farroupilha Capital, Alegrete beats with tradition all year. Its CTGs keep the Pampa's folk dances, music and ranch life alive.
trad_intro_p: Gaúcho Tradition Centers (CTGs) are the heart of country culture. Their halls host dances, criollo rodeos, folk dancing, poetry and the chimarrão circle, especially in September, when Farroupilha Week takes over the city.
trad_list_p: Addresses and contacts for Alegrete's CTGs, DTGs and traditionalist groups.
trad_disclaimer: Each CTG's schedule (rodeos, dances and country parties) changes through the year, confirm dates and times directly with each group.
trad_lojas_p: Where to find pilchas, bombachas, hats, boots, horse tack and everything to dress gaúcho in Alegrete, from traditional outfitters to leather workshops.
food_agro_p: Alegrete is Brazil's National Capital of the Traditional Country Sausage, producing over 500 tonnes a year. Meet the producers and butcher shops that carry the flavor forward.
food_agro_take_p: Taking an Alegrete sausage home means taking a piece of local culture. Handmade, it carries the taste of the land and the legacy of the old drovers, the perfect souvenir of your trip.
food_pad_p: From the legendary bolacha do Nero to cucas, breads and neighborhood confectioneries: a tour of the bakeries that scent Alegrete's mornings.
food_pad_take_p: An Alegrete icon since 1972, Nero's toasted biscuit crossed generations and became a cherished memory of the city. Tasting one is biting into a piece of Alegrete's history.
feiras_p: Vegetables, cheeses, cucas and honey straight from the people who grow them. Alegrete's markets connect shoppers with family farming, fair prices, fresh food and money kept in town.
feiras_note: Days and times can change from edition to edition, please confirm on the City Hall and Agriculture Department's official channels.
feiras_take_p: Taking home a colonial cheese, a cuca or a jar of honey from the market directly supports Alegrete's rural families, and brings the true taste of the Pampa to your table.
exp_feiras_d: Vegetables, cheeses, cucas and honey straight from the producer at the city's markets.
getting_agencies_p: Local agencies help build itineraries, book tickets and organize tours across the Western Frontier and beyond.
exp_tradicoes_d: Gaúcho Tradition Centers, piquetes and the Pampa's Farroupilha soul.
exp_divulgacoes_d: Talks, events and campaigns: what's happening in Alegrete.
divulg_lead: Talks, events and campaigns from Alegrete and the region. Stay up to date and take part.
divulg_note: Dates and times may change; always confirm through the organizers' official channels.
divulg_empty: No announcements right now. Check back soon!
